headline: Micron surges 15% on memory price boom
detail: Micron's revenue quadrupled as memory prices spike, driven by AI infrastructure buildout. This is direct positive read-through for the semiconductor sector — SMH (your profitable HOLD) should benefit, and it may give AVGO a short-term lift, which is your best window to trim that losing largest position.

headline: Qualcomm stock soaring on strong numbers
detail: Qualcomm's big move reinforces that the chip cycle is strengthening broadly, not just in memory. This supports your SMH position and suggests the sector rotation into semis has real fundamental backing today, not just noise.

headline: SpaceX wins military space-laser contract with Lockheed and Rocket Lab
detail: Rocket Lab and Lockheed are partners in a SpaceX military laser project, signaling SpaceX's defense revenue is expanding. This is directly relevant to SPCX and SPAL — positive for the SpaceX thesis, but SPCX is still a brand-new IPO with thin data and SPAL's leveraged decay means don't get complacent on the stop.

headline: Trump meets defense CEOs amid missile stockpile strain
detail: Rising defense spending urgency and strained stockpiles point to increased government contracts across aerospace and defense. Tangentially supportive of the SpaceX military angle in SPCX, but watch whether this becomes broader defense spending news that could shift sentiment.
